data.title: Foghorn Therapeutics raises $50M in equity financing from BVF Partners, Deerfield Management and others for 2026 goals.
data.description: In a recent funding round, a total of $50 million was secured through investments from BVF Partners, Deerfield Management, founding investor Flagship Pioneering, and a prominent biotech mutual fund. The transaction is expected to be finalized on January 13th, 2026.

data.title: 9 Lakes region in East Tennessee announces 2026 cycling calendar featuring new Pinnacle Challenge for a tough climb and scenic views.
data.description: East Tennessee's 9 Lakes Region has released its 2026 cycling schedule, featuring the inaugural Pinnacle Challenge. This new road-cycling event offers breathtaking views and a rigorous endurance test. The announcement was made in Norris, Tennessee on January 9, 2026.

data.title: A16z secures $15B, cites crypto as vital for US tech dominance in next century.
data.description: A recent report emphasizes the importance of cryptocurrency in upholding America's technological superiority. Venture capital firm a16z has secured an additional $15 billion to support technology investments aligned with American interests.

data.title: Brokered private placement led by Centurion One Capital upsized to $2.75M by VR.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, with a total of 600,000 new jobs added in the last month. This marks a significant improvement from the previous period, where the rate was at 5% and only 400,000 jobs were created. The strong job market has also led to an increase in wages by 3.5%, providing a boost to the economy. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook, citing the sustained growth in various sectors as a driving factor behind the positive trend. Additionally, the report showed a decrease in the number of people seeking unemployment benefits, suggesting a growing confidence in job security among workers.

data.title: BiLight debuts at CES 2026 with flexible perovskite PV technology, a game-changer in energy innovation era.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, the 2026 Consumer Electronics Show (CES 2026) concluded in Las Vegas, USA after a successful four-day run. BiLight, a top player in flexible perovskite photovoltaic technology, made a striking debut at the event, showcasing its innovations in green energy solutions. The event attracted a significant number of attendees and industry professionals, highlighting the growing interest in sustainable technologies.

data.title: Princeton Radiology buys 2 imaging centers in NJ from RAI, a Radiology Partners practice, expanding its reach.
data.description: Princeton Radiology revealed on January 9, 2026, that they have acquired two imaging centers in Hamilton and Lawrenceville, New Jersey, from Radiology Affiliates Imaging (RAI), part of the Radiology Partners practice. This marks an expansion for the company, adding significant resources to their network.

data.title: CES 2026 showcases cutting-edge tech across all industries, in Las Vegas, with record-breaking attendance.
data.description: The worldwide innovation platform is experiencing remarkable growth, reshaping the boundaries of potential in various sectors and showcasing the pervasive influence of technology in our daily experiences. The renowned tech event, CES® 2026, recently concluded in Las Vegas after running for four days. This event is considered the leading global tech event and attracted a substantial audience, including over 180,000 attendees and featured more than 4,500 exhibiting companies, presenting the latest advancements and trends in the tech industry.

data.title: MeiG Smart debuts 100 TOPS AI Module at CES 2026, revolutionizing AI era with SNM983 & MT200 series.
data.description: In recent news, the SNM983 Series has been introduced as an advanced AI module boasting impressive performance capabilities of reaching up to 100 TOPS. This marks a significant shift in architecture for the current AI-centric era, indicating a substantial advancement in technology. Additionally, the MT200 Series has been unveiled as an industrial-grade Edge AI BOX solution. This innovative product sets a new standard in computing by offering a flexible, reliable, and plug-and-play approach. This development signals a shift towards more accessible and efficient computing solutions in various industrial settings.

data.title: Earlybird Breakfast Burritos opens its first Orange County location on Jan 17 in Costa Mesa, offering one-pound burritos and free ones for first 100 guests.
data.description: On January 17, a popular breakfast brand will launch in Costa Mesa, offering their famous one-pound breakfast burritos. The opening at The LAB Anti-Mall will also feature a special promotion: the first 100 customers will receive a free burrito. This news was announced on January 9, 2026, from the brand's press release.

data.title: Stablecoin card use set to rise in 2026 with Rain's $250M funding - potential key trend, says Dragonfly exec.
data.description: Investors in the cryptocurrency space are predicting a significant increase in the use of stablecoin cards by the year 2026, following a substantial $250 million investment in fintech startup Rain. This funding will be used to promote the adoption of stablecoin payments through innovative financial solutions.

data.title: MindWalk (NASDAQ: HYFT) identifies universal constraint in influenza program, using HYFT® Deep Data technology.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, MindWalk Holdings Corp. revealed significant progress in its universal influenza program. The company, listed as (NASDAQ: HYFT), specializes in Bio-Native AI therapeutic research and technology. They announced a discovery related to a functional constraint present in various influenza viruses despite ongoing evolution. Thanks to their patented HYFT® Deep Data technology, MindWalk pinpointed a consistent pattern within influenza biology that endures over time.

data.title: Walmart Inc. will be added to Nasdaq-100 Index on Jan 20, 2026; trading under tickers WMT, NDX, NDXX, NDXE.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, Nasdaq revealed that Walmart Inc. (Nasdaq: WMT) is set to join the Nasdaq-100 Index ® (NDX ®), the Nasdaq-100 Equal Weighted™ Index (NDXE™), and the Nasdaq-100 Ex-Tech Sector™ Index (NDXX™) on January 20, 2026. This move will occur before the market opens, marking Walmart's inclusion in these indices on the first trading day after the third Friday of the month.

data.title: RecycLiCo grants 3M stock options to director Rob Chang at $0.13 per share, expiring Jan 8, 2031.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, in Delta, British Columbia, RecycLiCo Battery Materials Inc. disclosed that it has provided 3,000,000 stock options to Rob Chang, who serves as a director. These options were granted under the Company’s omnibus equity incentive scheme. Each stock option holds an exercise price of $0.13 per share and is valid until January 8, 2031. RecycLiCo, identified by the ticker symbols TSX.V: AMY, OTCQB: AMYZF, and FSE: ID4, specializes in refining critical minerals and upcycling lithium-ion batteries.

data.title: Dreame Technology showcased LEAPTIC Cube at CES 2026, highlighting advanced imaging tech. Global leader in consumer electronics.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 9, 2026, the conclusion of CES 2026 highlighted the emergence of a significant advancement in intelligent imaging, championed by Dreame Technology. As a key player in top-tier consumer electronics and smart manufacturing, Dreame Technology took advantage of the global platform to introduce their latest innovations...

data.title: Metropolitan Water District releases statement on Federal Draft EIS for Colorado River Operations, highlights need for consensus agreement.
data.description: In Los Angeles today, Metropolitan Water District General Manager Shivaji Deshmukh commented on the U.S. Bureau of Reclamation's Draft Environmental Impact Statement for post-2026 operations of Lake Powell and Lake Mead. Deshmukh emphasized the need for a consensus among all Colorado River water users in response to the five alternatives outlined in the report. The Draft EIS release serves as a reminder of the importance of cooperation and agreement on future water management strategies.

data.title: Peak Technology launches APEX platform for OEMs, offering rapid prototyping and high volume manufacturing.
data.description: Peak Technology, based in Silicon Valley, has introduced APEX, an Advanced Purchase Order Execution System, designed for Semiconductor, Bio-Medical, Aerospace, and other Deep Tech sectors. This leading provider of quick turn prototyping and advanced manufacturing services aims to enhance collaboration between OEMs through its new platform. APEX formalizes Peak's distinctive manufacturing technology, offering unparalleled responsiveness, integration, and support to customers.

data.title: Stablecoin card use set to surge in 2026 as Rain secures $250M for fintech venture: Dragonfly exec.
data.description: In 2026, it is predicted by crypto venture capitalists that the adoption of stablecoin cards will see a significant increase. This comes after fintech startup Rain successfully obtained a substantial funding of $250 million to promote the use of stablecoin payments.

data.title: Corgi raises $108M, gets regulatory approval to launch startup insurance; uses AI for end-to-end operations.
data.description: Corgi has recently been granted a carrier license and is utilizing AI technology to provide comprehensive insurance services for startups, including underwriting, claims processing, and policy management. The company, headquartered in San Francisco, disclosed on January 9, 2026, that it secured a substantial funding of $108 million from notable investors such as Y Combinator and Kindred.

data.title: Global Top Brands (GTB) celebrates 20th anniversary, reveals winners in 2025-2026 with Chinese electronics brands leading.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 9, 2026, the Global Top Brands (GTB) marked its 20th anniversary and announced the recipients of the 2025–2026 awards on January 7. Established in 2006 by International Data Group (IDC), GTB is overseen by Asia Digital Group and Europe Digital Group, celebrating top brands worldwide.

data.title: Stock market sees high with earning approaching for JPMorgan, Goldman, Taiwan Semi, Delta. Two major conferences, inflation data, and possible Trump tariffs up next.
data.description: The stock market is currently experiencing record highs, with notable companies such as JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Taiwan Semiconductor, and Delta scheduled to release their earnings reports. Additionally, there are two significant conferences, upcoming inflation data, and a potential ruling on Trump's tariffs to keep an eye on. The Dow Jones Futures suggest a widespread, robust rally in the market, prompting investors to evaluate whether their stock portfolios align with this positive trend.
